spec.goal: Align skill-routing, workspaces, scout-skeptic, and runtime wording so implementation tasks enter workspaces reliably, scout-skeptic triggers as a checkpoint instead of a sidecar-first protocol, and repo-local validation covers the intended routing contract.
success_criteria: workspaces frontmatter and repo conventions describe non-read-only implementation work as the default isolated-lane entrypoint without relying on body-only wording
scout-skeptic and runtime AGENTS/config/agent prompts remove stale sidecar terminology and describe a checkpoint model with optional read-only child-agent execution
routing fixtures and smoke coverage reflect the updated contract and repo-native verification passes
constraints: Keep single-file and trivial read-only tasks on the direct path
Do not widen child capability beyond existing read-only scout/skeptic behavior
Keep source and live runtime wording aligned where this task edits both repos

tasks.title: Align routing contracts and workspace convention
tasks.objective: Update repo-local routing and workspace guidance so the desired triggers are carried by the actual routing surfaces and the repo itself supports the documented .workspaces convention.
outputs: Updated frontmatter and policy wording for workspaces and routing

tasks.title: Convert scout-skeptic to checkpoint-first wording
tasks.objective: Remove sidecar-centric language from source and live runtime surfaces and replace it with checkpoint-first scout/skeptic wording plus optional child-agent execution semantics.
outputs: Updated scout-skeptic skill and runtime prompts/config
Terminology aligned across source and live runtime

tasks.title: Refresh fixtures and smoke coverage
tasks.objective: Update routing fixtures and static smoke checks so they exercise the new checkpoint and workspaces contract and catch future drift.
inputs: README skill catalog entries if wording changed
outputs: Updated fixture set and validation expectations

triggers: A wording change would require a different runtime model than checkpoint plus optional child-agent execution
Fixture or smoke updates reveal that the intended routing contract conflicts with another checked-in skill

evidence: Verified repo root was clean before work, then added .workspaces ignore support so the documented lane convention is valid in this repo.
Created self-contained workspace lane at .workspaces/chore-routing-trigger-hardening on branch chore/routing-trigger-hardening.

Inspected current workspaces/scout-skeptic/skill-routing docs plus home/codex AGENTS and runtime prompts; sidecar terminology remained in source/live wording and workspaces default-entry routing was still body-only.
Updated workspaces frontmatter and README/.gitignore so non-read-only implementation work now routes through repo-local .workspaces lanes with matching repo convention.
Converted scout-skeptic and home/codex runtime wording from sidecar-first language to checkpoint wording with optional read-only child-agent execution.
Expanded routing fixtures and smoke assertions to require at least one generic workspaces case and one scout-skeptic case without explicit parallel/adversarial jargon.

Verification passed: python3 dev/skill-routing/run_smoke.py, python3 dev/skill-routing/run_smoke.py --runtime-policy /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/skill-routing/child-skill-policy.toml --runtime-skills-root /Users/xavier/.codex/skills, python3 dev/scout-skeptic/run_smoke.py, python3 dev/workspaces/run_smoke.py, and git diff --check.
